골로새서 1:1.content: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God, and Timothy our brother,

골로새서 1:2.content: to the saints and faithful brothers in Christ at Colossae: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

골로새서 1:3.content: We give thanks to God the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, praying always for you,

골로새서 1:4.content: having heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and of the love which you have toward all the saints,

골로새서 1:5.content: because of the hope which is laid up for you in the heavens, of which you heard before in the word of the truth of the Good News

골로새서 1:6.content: which has come to you, even as it is in all the world and is bearing fruit and growing, as it does in you also, since the day you heard and knew the grace of God in truth,

골로새서 1:7.content: even as you learned of Epaphras our beloved fellow servant, who is a faithful servant of Christ on your behalf,

골로새서 1:8.content: who also declared to us your love in the Spirit.

골로새서 1:9.content: For this cause, we also, since the day we heard this, don’t cease praying and making requests for you, that you may be filled with the knowledge of his will in all spiritual wisdom and understanding,

골로새서 1:10.content: that you may walk worthily of the Lord, to please him in all respects, bearing fruit in every good work and increasing in the knowledge of God,

골로새서 1:11.content: strengthened with all power, according to the might of his glory, for all endurance and perseverance with joy,

골로새서 1:12.content: giving thanks to the Father, who made us fit to be partakers of the inheritance of the saints in light,

골로새서 1:13.content: who delivered us out of the power of darkness, and translated us into the Kingdom of the Son of his love,

골로새서 1:14.content: in whom we have our redemption, the forgiveness of our sins.

골로새서 1:15.content: He is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of all creation.

골로새서 1:16.content: For by him all things were created in the heavens and on the earth, visible things and invisible things, whether thrones or dominions or principalities or powers. All things have been created through him and for him.

골로새서 1:17.content: He is before all things, and in him all things are held together.

골로새서 1:18.content: He is the head of the body, the assembly, who is the beginning, the firstborn from the dead, that in all things he might have the preeminence.

골로새서 1:19.content: For all the fullness was pleased to dwell in him,

골로새서 1:20.content: and through him to reconcile all things to himself by him, whether things on the earth or things in the heavens, having made peace through the blood of his cross.

골로새서 1:21.content: You, being in past times alienated and enemies in your mind in your evil deeds,

골로새서 1:22.content: yet now he has reconciled in the body of his flesh through death, to present you holy and without defect and blameless before him,

골로새서 1:23.content: if it is so that you continue in the faith, grounded and steadfast, and not moved away from the hope of the Good News which you heard, which is being proclaimed in all creation under heaven, of which I, Paul, was made a servant.

골로새서 1:24.content: Now I rejoice in my sufferings for your sake, and fill up on my part that which is lacking of the afflictions of Christ in my flesh for his body’s sake, which is the assembly,

골로새서 1:25.content: of which I was made a servant according to the stewardship of God which was given me toward you to fulfill the word of God,

골로새서 1:26.content: the mystery which has been hidden for ages and generations. But now it has been revealed to his saints,

골로새서 1:27.content: to whom God was pleased to make known what are the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles, which is Christ in you, the hope of glory.

골로새서 1:28.content: We proclaim him, admonishing every man and teaching every man in all wisdom, that we may present every man perfect in Christ Jesus;

골로새서 1:29.content: for which I also labor, striving according to his working, which works in me mightily.
